//: Maps OpenClaw agent IDs to Denizen NPC display names. Loaded by src/openclaw-worldstate-bridge.js. Auto-assignment fills in any missing IDs at runtime; persisted to localStorage so the same OpenClaw agent reliably gets the same NPC across page reloads. Edit by hand to pin a specific agent → NPC, or wipe and let the auto-assigner pick.
//npcRoleHints: Used by the auto-assigner to pick the most coherent NPC for a tool kind. Database tools → Pier (data engineer), GitHub → Oscar (devops), browser/vision → Bob (researcher), etc. The role text comes from each NPC's SOUL.md `## Role` line.
